meta.spread_convention: spread = DA - RT; positive => DA expensive => SHORT DA / Long RT signal
meta.data_status: PRODUCTION — Smartbidder + Yes Energy present; Congestion Stage 0 provisional; Tenaska unavailable

notes: HE09-11 skip: congestion-adjusted skip rule triggered (MED P + HIGH adverse WEST_TO_NORTH binding probability)
HE14 skip: GR_WEST wind trough minimum (4537 MW) — highest WEST_TO_NORTH binding hour
HE18 skip: ramp-onset asymmetric risk + Sunday holiday load uncertainty
HE24 skip: spread inverted (RT > DA, P(DA<RT) = 54.9% — below 55% threshold)

positions.risk_note: Solar peak hour (30257 MW); thin spread but P=67.6% above HIGH threshold. WEST_TO_NORTH congestion window technically active — HB_HOUSTON minimizes basis exposure. Max adverse loss ~$50 at 25 MW.
New entry hour. Highest P of midday-afternoon block (69.6%). Wind recovering from HE14 trough. WEST_TO_NORTH risk transitioning out. MED due to spread size. Max adverse loss ~$65 at 25 MW.
Confirmed pattern from prior 3 cycles (2026-05-27, 05-28, 05-29). Afternoon pre-ramp. Wind recovery underway. MED 25 MW on spread size. Max adverse loss ~$65 at 25 MW.
Best spread of MED block (+$2.45 raw). Pre-peak; Sunday load peaks HE17-18. GR_COASTAL wind rises HE18-19. MED 25 MW. Max adverse loss ~$70 at 25 MW.

Solar exit onset. Net load ramp in full force (+16558 MW total HE18-HE21). P=68.7%, spread +$8.31. Seven consecutive prior cycles SHORT DA at this hour — all LIKELY WIN. SOUTH_TO_HOUSTON MEDIUM-HIGH (28-38%) basis risk at HB_HOUSTON. Stop-loss: if reserves < 2500 MW at 09:30 CT, reduce to 25 MW. Max adverse loss ~$500 at spike +$10/MWh.

HIGHEST P OF DAY (71.4%). Largest spread. Primary P&L hour. DA $45.13 subject to Smartbidder peak overestimation bias ($10-15/MWh per market-analyst). Corrected DA range ~$30-35 — spread could compress. P signal overrides spread uncertainty. No extreme cap needed (DA < $55 cap trigger). Stop-loss: if DAM clears HE20 < $36, reduce to 25 MW. Max adverse loss ~$500 at spike +$10/MWh.

Net load apex HE21 (54868 MW). P=68.9%, spread +$6.43. DA $36.03 well below $70 cap trigger — no cap applied. Wind recovery and Sunday load setback suppress RT. Stop-loss: if DAM clears HE21 > $50, apply $50 cap. Max adverse loss ~$250 at spike +$5/MWh.

P=67.4% — HIGH tier. Spread narrow (+$1.58) due to Sunday DA compression vs weekday. Wind strongly recovering toward 22088 MW overnight. Post-peak load declining. HIGH 50 MW on probability signal despite narrow spread. Max adverse loss ~$150 at +$3/MWh adverse.
